# Fika & Co

> A cafe, kitchen and bar at 7 High Street, Norton, Stockton-on-Tees TS20 1AH.
> Inspired by the Swedish ritual of fika: brunch, speciality coffee, small plates and cocktails.
> Tagline: slow down, sip well, eat bright.

## Contact
- Address: 7 High Street, Norton, Stockton-on-Tees, TS20 1AH, United Kingdom
- Phone: 01642 609341
- Email: info@fikaco.com
- Google rating: 4.8 out of 5 from 44 reviews
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/fika.co_norton
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/people/FikaCo-Norton/61576331661216/

## The Fika Week (opening hours)
- Monday: 8am–2pm (brunch menu)
- Tuesday: 8am–2pm (brunch menu)
- Wednesday: 8am–4pm
- Thursday: 8am–10pm
- Friday: 8am–10pm
- Saturday: 9am–10pm
- Sunday: 9am–2pm

## Menus
- All-Day: brunch served all day, mains from 11.30am
- Brunch: Mondays and Tuesdays, 8am–2pm
- Evening: small plates made for sharing
- Thursday Set Menu: £35 per person
- Bar Snacks: Thursday–Saturday, 5pm–8.30pm, any 3 for £15
- Desserts, Coffee & After-Dinner

## Book / vouchers
- Book a table: https://togo.uk.com/makebookingv2.aspx?venueid=2744&nv=true
- Gift vouchers: https://togo.uk.com/voucherpurchase.aspx?venueid=2744

## Notes
- Owner/founder: Michael Jones. Front of house: Harry.
